source_rationale: PRG4 (proteoglycan 4/lubricin) is a marker of synovial fibroblasts and mesenchymal stromal cells

MFAP5 (microfibril-associated protein 5) is characteristic of fibroblast ECM production

CD34 marks a subset of interstitial/adventitial fibroblasts

THY1 (CD90) is a well-known surface marker of fibroblasts and mesenchymal cells
IL1RL1 (ST2) is a marker of Th2 cells and tissue-resident T helper cells
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for Th2 cell differentiation
KLRB1 (CD161) marks Th17/innate-like T cells and is highly expressed here
HPGD is associated with regulatory/Th2 T cells and prostaglandin metabolism
IL7R (CD127) is a marker of naive and memory T cells

RORA is a transcription factor involved in Th2/ILC2 differentiation

PTGDR2 (CRTH2) is a definitive marker of Th2 cells
